tagline: Music that fits your next moment

designSystem.style: Aurora UI + Glassmorphism — ethereal gradient-mesh surfaces with frosted-glass cards, violet-to-cyan emotional arc gradients, and depth-layered card hierarchy. Mood transitions visualized as live gradient progress bars. Dark mode uses deep indigo-black with luminous violet accents.

screens: Onboarding (3-step: context-aware intro, Moment Bridge, energy timeline)
Home (energy state, Up Next prediction card, Scene Modes 2×2 grid, today's predictions)
Bridge (Moment Bridge transition engine, scene selector pills, emotional arc visualization, transition track sequence)
Now Playing (waveform album art, mood transition mini-bar, playback controls, up next)
Day (energy curve bar chart, planned transitions timeline with type-coded entries)
Settings (profile stats, light/dark theme toggle, intelligence toggles, calibration)
keyFeatures: Predicted activity playlists from calendar + location
Moment Bridge: 4-phase emotional transition sequences (Release → Settle → Ground → Arrive)
Daily energy timeline with bar chart and type-coded activity blocks
One-tap scene modes: Post-Meeting Reset, Pre-Date Confidence, Deep Work Entry, Late Night Unwind
Interactive waveform player with live mood-phase indicator
Animated onboarding with per-step accent color theming
